info.name: HT-Cash-DA-CLM-adaptive-time-1-fix2
info.description:
HT v18 fix2 — $4M Pool · 1 CLM · NO MIRROR · Derive Pattern · BTC PROFIT

  FIX2 vs fix1:
  ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  ROOT CAUSE (fix1 BTC net = $0): CLM is a zero-interest USD contract.
    Σ(PP payoffs) + MD payoff = initial NP = $1,000,000 always.
    PP payoffs are fractions of USD NP (book value), not BTC × spotPrice.
    BTC price appreciation is invisible in CLM contract cash flows.

  FIX: Phase 0 JS derive now computes ACTUAL MARKET PROCEEDS:
    For each PP with payoff P at spot price S:
      btcSold = initialQty × (P / runningNP) × (runningNP / initialNP)
             = 20 × P / 1,000,000
      actualProceeds = btcSold × S
      profit = actualProceeds - P = P × ((S / purchasePrice) - 1)

    This is the stablecoin4 'flexible JS layer' pattern: ACTUS contracts
    produce structural events, JS post-processing computes economic value.

  PRICE PATH (stronger bull run):
    Buy at $50K → peaks $97K (94% above purchase) → ends $78K (56% above)
    Average sell price ~$80K → ~60% appreciation captured.

  EXPECTED PROFIT:
    BTC: 20 BTC bought at $50K ($1M), sold at avg ~$80K → ~$1.6M return → ~$600K profit
    T-bills: $11,887 yield (same as fix1)
    Combined: ~$612K gain on $4M pool → ~15% return
    Final cash: ~$4,612K (vs $4,012K in fix1)

  RESEARCH REFERENCES:
  Nakamoto (2008): Bitcoin: A Peer-to-Peer Electronic Cash System
  FASB ASU 2023-08: Crypto Assets — fair value through net income
  SEC SAB 121 (2022): Custodied Digital Assets
  Basel BCBS d545: Prudential Treatment of Cryptoasset Exposures
  CFA Institute (2024): Digital Asset Portfolio Management
  Bianchi & Babiak (2022): On the Performance of Cryptocurrency Funds, JBF
  Liu & Tsyvinski (2021): Risks and Returns of Cryptocurrency, RFS 34(6)

  ZERO CODE CHANGES. Collection JSON only.

item.name: 0.6 Run Phase 0 — capture events, compute MARKET-VALUE BTC proceeds

exec: console.log('━ PHASE 0.6 fix2: MARKET-VALUE BTC proceeds (not book value)');
console.log('  Root cause in fix1: CLM PP = fraction of USD NP (book value)');
console.log('  Fix: btcSold × spotPrice = actual market proceeds');
console.log('  CLM: ' + clmEvents.length + ' events, IED=$' + Math.round(clmIedPayoff).toLocaleString()
// ══════ C: Deployment schedule (same as fix1: book value) ══════
// D: BTC SELL SCHEDULE — ACTUAL MARKET PROCEEDS (fix2 key change)
// fix1 used raw CLM PP payoffs (book value = fraction of USD NP).
// This is the stablecoin4 'flexible JS layer' pattern: ACTUS
// contracts produce structural events, JS post-processing
// computes the economic value using market prices.
var btcSellMap = {};  // time → amountUSD (handles same-time merges)
console.log('  Date       BTC Sold   Spot     Book Value   Market Value  Profit');
// BTC sold = proportional to NP fraction
// CLM MD: remaining BTC at final spot price
// ══════ F: Cash balance at each epoch (using MARKET proceeds) ══════
// BTC sells at MARKET VALUE (fix2: NOT book value)
var cashTL=[]; var btcTL=[]; var tbillTL=[]; var portTL=[];
// ── BTC value (actual qty × spot, from CLM NP reduction) ──
console.log('Date        Total          BTC             T-Bills         Cash            BTC%   TBill% Cash%');
var c=cashTL[i].value; var b=btcTL[i].value; var tb=tbillTL[i].value; var tot=portTL[i].value;
console.log('━ Phase 1 complete: 4 derived RI + 2 market RI + 3 derived SCF + 1 LB');});
console.log('HT v18 fix2 — MARKET-VALUE BTC PROCEEDS · BTC PROFIT');
// CLM total out = |IED| = $1M, total in = Σ(PP) + MD = $1M (book value)
// CASH-PAM BTC inflows (scf_btc_proceeds) = market value > book value
console.log('  CLM book return (Σ PP+MD): $'+Math.round(clmBookReturn).toLocaleString()+' (always = initial NP)');
